identity.philosophy: Precision, Clarity, and Architectural Structure. Finance is not about decoration; it is about data visibility.
anti_patterns: No rounded-xl cards (use sharp or rounded-sm for precision).
No low-contrast gray text on gray backgrounds.
No 'cute' illustrations. Use abstract geometry or data visualizations.

headings.usage: Use for all Page Titles, Card Headings, and Marketing Copy. Weight: 600 or 800.

body.usage: Use for standard UI text, labels, and inputs.

data.usage: MANDATORY for all financial data, prices, P&L figures, and dates. Ensures tabular alignment.

rules: Use font-data (JetBrains Mono) for any number that changes.

primary.description: Deep Navy/Slate for Authority. Avoid generic bright blue.

gradients.subtle_mesh: radial-gradient(at 0% 0%, hsla(210,100%,96%,1) 0, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(at 100% 0%, hsla(150,100%,96%,1) 0, transparent 50%)

layout.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard, but doubled for sections (py-20, py-32).

buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border border-input hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground

cards.style: bg-white border border-border rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.style: h-10 rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2

landing_hero.alt: Abstract structured white geometry representing financial structure
landing_hero.usage: Hero section background with low opacity overlay

abstract_bg.usage: Section dividers or subtle background for feature cards

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

instructions_to_main_agent: Install '@radix-ui/react-slot' and 'class-variance-authority' for shadcn utils if missing.
Ensure all financial data is formatted with 'Intl.NumberFormat' for currency.
For the Landing Page: Use the 'Manrope' font prominently. Create a 'Trust' section with a clean grid of features.
For the Dashboard: Maximize screen real estate. Use a dense grid. Do not use large paddings inside the dashboard widgets.
Authentication: Use a clean, centered card layout with a subtle noise texture background.

general: Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetics (generic gradients, rounded-xl everywhere).
Use depth through z-index and subtle borders.
NO transition: all. Animate specific properties.
NO text-align: center on app container.
Interactive elements must have hover/active states.
testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (kebab-case).
